description_long: This object consists of a wooden log with a hammer embedded into its top surface. The hammer features a long, straight wooden handle and a metallic head with a flat striking face. The log is cylindrical, with visible growth rings on the cut ends and a rough, natural bark texture along its length. The hammer is positioned at an angle, partially driven into the log, suggesting recent use. The log rests on a flat, stone-textured ground plane, and a small, cut branch stub is visible on the log's upper surface. The overall appearance is rustic, with natural wood tones and a utilitarian design.
description: A wooden log with a hammer embedded in its top, featuring a straight wooden handle and a metallic head. The log is cylindrical and rests on a stone-textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end of the log, the hammer angled into the top, and the handle extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the log, the hammer's head embedded in the top, and a small branch stub visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the hammer handle angled forward and the log's end grain visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the log's length, the hammer handle pointing upward, and the branch stub more clearly.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: standard hammer head, metallic, with a flat striking face and no visible claw or peen
